ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRat / Dolphin C2 to legitimate cloud APIs (pCloud, Yandex, Dropbox, Box)
ucs.description: Hunts for outbound web traffic to the specific legitimate cloud-storage API endpoints that ScarCruft's RokRat, Dolphin and CHINOTTO backdoors use as their command-and-control channel — issued by a process that is NOT one of the vendors' real sync clients or a sanctioned browser. APT37 is one of the few clusters that operationalised pCloud + Yandex Cloud + Dropbox + Box as full C2 platforms, so a non-sync binary speaking those APIs is highly specific to this actor.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count, min(_time) as firstTime, max(_time) as lastTime, values(All_Traffic.user) as user, values(All_Traffic.app) as app, values(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest IN ("api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","webdav.yandex.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","notify.dropboxapi.com","api.box.com","upload.box.com") OR All_Traffic.url IN ("*api.pcloud.com*","*cloud-api.yandex*","*content.dropboxapi.com*","*api.dropboxapi.com*","*api.box.com*")) AND NOT (All_Traffic.app IN ("dropbox.exe","pcloud.exe","pcloud_x64.exe","yandexdisk.exe","yandexdisk2.exe","box.exe","boxsync.exe","boxedit.exe","msedge.exe","chrome.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","opera.exe","iexplore.exe","onedrive.exe")) by All_Traffic.src, All_Traffic.dest, All_Traffic.app, All_Traffic.user, host | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | where count > 1 | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// APT37 / ScarCruft — RokRat & Dolphin abuse api.pcloud.com / cloud-api.yandex.net /
// content.dropboxapi.com / api.box.com as C2. Look for non-sync, non-browser binaries
// reaching those endpoints.
let _legit_cloud_clients = dynamic([
  "dropbox.exe","pcloud.exe","pcloud_x64.exe","yandexdisk.exe","yandexdisk2.exe",
  "box.exe","boxsync.exe","boxedit.exe","msedge.exe","chrome.exe","firefox.exe",
  "brave.exe","opera.exe","iexplore.exe","onedrive.exe","outlook.exe","teams.exe"
]);
let _rokrat_c2_hosts = dynamic([
  "api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com",
  "cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","webdav.yandex.com",
  "content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","notify.dropboxapi.com",
  "api.box.com","upload.box.com"
]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","HttpConnectionInspected","ConnectionAttempt")
| where RemoteUrl has_any (_rokrat_c2_hosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_legit_cloud_clients)
| where not(InitiatingProcessFolderPath startswith @"C:\Program Files\")     // exclude vendor-installed clients
| where not(InitiatingProcessFolderPath startswith @"C:\Program Files (x86)\")
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            Hosts     = make_set(RemoteUrl, 10),
            SampleCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine)
            by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName,
               InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
               InitiatingProcessSHA256
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37 RokRat / Dolphin cloud C2 — Sentinel side via Windows DNS + 4688 process-create.
// DnsEvents provides the resolution; SecurityEvent provides the requesting process.
let _legit_cloud_clients = dynamic([
  "dropbox.exe","pcloud.exe","pcloud_x64.exe","yandexdisk.exe","yandexdisk2.exe",
  "box.exe","boxsync.exe","boxedit.exe","msedge.exe","chrome.exe","firefox.exe",
  "brave.exe","opera.exe","iexplore.exe","onedrive.exe","outlook.exe"
]);
let _rokrat_c2_hosts = dynamic([
  "api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com",
  "cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","webdav.yandex.com",
  "content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","notify.dropboxapi.com",
  "api.box.com","upload.box.com"
]);
let _dnsHits = DnsEvents
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
  | where Name has_any (_rokrat_c2_hosts)
  | project DnsTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, ClientIP, ResolvedName = Name;
let _procCreate = SecurityEvent
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
  | where EventID == 4688
  | where Account !endswith "$"
  | extend ProcLeaf = tostring(split(NewProcessName,"\\")[-1])
  | where ProcLeaf !in~ (_legit_cloud_clients)
  | project ProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ProcLeaf, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
_dnsHits
| join kind=inner _procCreate on Computer
| where ProcTime between (DnsTime - 5m .. DnsTime + 1m)
| project DnsTime, ProcTime, Computer, ClientIP, ResolvedName,
          Account, ProcLeaf, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName
| order by DnsTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 RokRat C2 to Legitimate Cloud Storage APIs
id: 7c3a1d4f-b9a2-4e8f-91e7-apt37rokratc2v1
status: experimental
description: Detects non-browser/non-vendor processes connecting to pCloud, Yandex Cloud, Dropbox or Box API endpoints — the documented C2 substrate for ScarCruft's RokRat and Dolphin malware families.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-reloaded/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1102.002
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_dst:
    DestinationHostname:
      - 'api.pcloud.com'
      - 'eapi.pcloud.com'
      - 'cloud-api.yandex.net'
      - 'cloud-api.yandex.com'
      - 'webdav.yandex.com'
      - 'content.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'notify.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.box.com'
      - 'upload.box.com'
  filter_legit:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\dropbox.exe'
      - '\pcloud.exe'
      - '\yandexdisk.exe'
      - '\box.exe'
      - '\boxsync.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
      - '\onedrive.exe'
      - '\outlook.exe'
  condition: selection_dst and not filter_legit
falsepositives:
  - Custom-built backup/sync utilities embedded in third-party software
  - Developer tools using Dropbox/Box SDKs from CLI
level: high
ucs.rationale: Generic 'cloud C2' detections fire constantly. APT37 specifically uses pCloud and Yandex.Cloud APIs (not just Dropbox like many actors) — pCloud especially is rare outside this cluster's tooling. Pinning the destination list to those exact API hostnames AND requiring the initiator to NOT be the vendor's real client / a browser collapses the false-positive surface to near-zero, while pinning the al
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 spear-phish chain: HWP / LNK-archive lure spawning encoded PowerShell or mshta
ucs.description: Detects ScarCruft's signature initial-access chain — a Hangul Word Processor document (Hwp.exe) or a weaponised LNK packed inside a ZIP/RAR/IMG archive — spawning powershell.exe / mshta.exe / rundll32.exe with hidden-window flags, base64 / EncodedCommand payloads, or remote-fetch primitives. This Office-document → script-host → in-memory loader handoff is a defining APT37 pattern (TEMP.Reaper / Group123) used to deliver RokRat and ROKRAT-family stagers.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count, min(_time) as firstTime, max(_time) as lastTime, values(Processes.process) as cmdlines from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name="Hwp.exe" OR Processes.parent_process_name="Hwp70.exe" OR Processes.parent_process_name="Hwp80.exe" OR Processes.parent_process="*.lnk*" OR Processes.parent_process="*.hwp*" OR (Processes.parent_process_name="explorer.exe" AND (Processes.parent_process="*.lnk*" OR Processes.parent_process="*\\Temp\\*\\*.lnk*")) OR Processes.parent_process_name IN ("WinRAR.exe","7zG.exe","7zFM.exe","Bandizip.exe")) AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") AND (Processes.process="*-EncodedCommand*" OR Processes.process="*-enc *" OR Processes.process="*-w hidden*" OR Processes.process="*-windowstyle hidden*" OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*Invoke-Expression*" OR Processes.process="*IEX(*" OR Processes.process="*-nop*" OR Processes.process="*bitsadmin*" OR Processes.process="*certutil*-decode*" OR Processes.process="*mshta*http*") AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by Processes.dest, Processes.user, Processes.parent_process_name, Processes.parent_process, Processes.process_name, Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// APT37 (ScarCruft / Group123) — Hwp / LNK lure → encoded script-host execution
let _hangul = dynamic(["Hwp.exe","Hwp70.exe","Hwp80.exe","Hwp90.exe","Hwp100.exe"]);
let _archivers = dynamic(["WinRAR.exe","7zG.exe","7zFM.exe","Bandizip.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let _scripthosts = dynamic([
  "powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe",
  "rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"
]);
let _evasion_tokens = dynamic([
  "-EncodedCommand","-enc ","-EC ","-w hidden","-windowstyle hidden",
  "FromBase64String","DownloadString","Invoke-Expression","IEX(",
  "-nop","-NoProfile","bitsadmin","certutil -decode",
  "javascript:","vbscript:"
]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ (_scripthosts)
| where (
      InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_hangul)                                       // Hangul Word Processor parent
   or (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_archivers)
       and InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (".lnk",".hwp",".zip",".rar",".iso",".img"))
   or (InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Local\Temp\",@"\Downloads\",@"\Public\")
       and InitiatingProcessCommandLine has ".lnk")
  )
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (_evasion_tokens)
   or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)https?://[^\s\"']+\.(hwp|lnk|zip|rar|exe|dll|bat|ps1|hta|cab)"
   or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)mshta(\.exe)?\s+https?://"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          Child       = FileName,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256, IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37 spear-phish chain — Sentinel via 4688 process-create
let _hangul = dynamic(["Hwp.exe","Hwp70.exe","Hwp80.exe","Hwp90.exe","Hwp100.exe"]);
let _archivers = dynamic(["WinRAR.exe","7zG.exe","7zFM.exe","Bandizip.exe","explorer.exe"]);
let _scripthosts = dynamic([
  "powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","cmd.exe",
  "rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"
]);
let _evasion_tokens = dynamic([
  "-EncodedCommand","-enc ","-EC ","-w hidden","-windowstyle hidden",
  "FromBase64String","DownloadString","Invoke-Expression","IEX(",
  "-nop","-NoProfile","bitsadmin","certutil -decode"
]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ChildLeaf = tostring(split(NewProcessName,"\\")[-1])
| extend ParentLeaf = tostring(split(ParentProcessName,"\\")[-1])
| where ChildLeaf in~ (_scripthosts)
| where (ParentLeaf in~ (_hangul))
   or  (ParentLeaf in~ (_archivers) and CommandLine has_any (".lnk",".hwp",".zip",".rar",".iso",".img"))
   or  (ParentProcessName has_any (@"\AppData\Local\Temp\",@"\Downloads\",@"\Public\") and CommandLine has ".lnk")
| where CommandLine has_any (_evasion_tokens)
   or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)https?://[^\s\"']+\.(hwp|lnk|zip|rar|exe|dll|bat|ps1|hta|cab)"
   or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)mshta(\.exe)?\s+https?://"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ParentProcessName, ParentLeaf,
          NewProcessName, ChildLeaf, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft HWP/LNK Lure Spawning Encoded Script Host
id: a1f7d0c2-e4b6-4d11-bf2a-apt37hwplnkv1
status: experimental
description: Detects ScarCruft's signature initial-access chain — Hangul Word Processor (Hwp.exe) or LNK-from-archive parent spawning powershell.exe / mshta.exe / rundll32.exe / wscript.exe with hidden-window, base64, or remote-fetch payloads.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-187a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1566.001
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218.005
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent_hangul:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\Hwp.exe'
      - '\Hwp70.exe'
      - '\Hwp80.exe'
      - '\Hwp90.exe'
      - '\Hwp100.exe'
  parent_lnk_in_archive:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\WinRAR.exe'
      - '\7zG.exe'
      - '\7zFM.exe'
      - '\Bandizip.exe'
      - '\explorer.exe'
    ParentCommandLine|contains:
      - '.lnk'
      - '.hwp'
      - '.iso'
      - '.img'
  child_scripthost:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  evasion_tokens:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - '-enc '
      - '-w hidden'
      - '-windowstyle hidden'
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - 'IEX('
      - '-nop'
      - 'bitsadmin'
      - 'certutil -decode'
  condition: (parent_hangul or parent_lnk_in_archive) and child_scripthost and evasion_tokens
falsepositives:
  - Korean enterprise users running legitimate macro-enabled HWP automation (rare; baseline first)
  - Internal red-team simulating APT37 TTPs
level: high
ucs.rationale: Hwp.exe (Hangul Word Processor) as a process parent is essentially a South-Korea-targeting marker — APT37's primary victim set. Pairing that parent (or an explorer/archiver-spawned LNK from Temp/Downloads) with a script-host child and evasion tokens captures the documented APT37 delivery loop (RokRat, ROKRAT, Dolphin loaders) without firing on generic phishing chains used by FIN/e-crime actors. Ge

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
